since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.30%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.24% · BTC +0.18% · Gold +0.00% · Nasdaq100 -1.22%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.30%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.30%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.79%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NET is the standout at +9.27%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +9.27%, DDOG +5.53%, ADBE +4.49%, PLTR +4.48%, NOW +4.48%. Laggards: INTC -9.19%, TER -9.12%, AMBA -8.59%, MRVL -7.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.07% at $152.28
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
